violations.text: Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (tamales) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

Rice and empanadas was observed held at 108-110 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview with PIC, foods were made less than 2 hours prior, PIC reheated at time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

Various TCS foods was observed held at 48-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

The establishment was observed using cheese that, per interview with person in charge, was made in the facility. Establishment is required to submit a variance proposal/detailed documentation as to how the product is prepared. Establishment is not permitted to sell or use cheese at this time. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by live roaches on ceiling. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The prep unit located in the kitchen was not in good repair. Ambient was observed at 49 degrees F. PIC called for service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The floors in the basement have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

Tamales, Chicken, tacos, and egg patties was observed held at 111-122 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product Reheated Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

Beans, sausages, and chicken tamales was observed held at (45-51) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product Disposed Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023
Inspector observed hand towels being used to cover food product in the 2 dr refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023
